body:
⚔️ My PvP Resource Pack

A clean and optimized Minecraft PvP texture pack designed for better performance, clearer visibility, and smooth competitive gameplay.

Perfect for Bedwars, Crystal PvP, and general PvP fights.

✨ Features:
🔥 Small Totem + custom Totem pop animation
💧 Clean & smooth water textures for better visibility
💥 Reduced crystal explosion particles for less visual clutter
🧱 Removed block breaking particles for cleaner fights
🍗 Smaller food items for better screen space
⚪ Reduced item sizes (Ender Pearls, tools, etc.)
⚡ FPS-friendly textures for smoother performance
